auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.general_idea: Uncomment and activate the SecurityFilterChain bean to explicitly configure HTTP security rules, replacing Spring Security's default configuration that was causing 401 errors.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.human_impl: Changed @Bean method from commented-out code to active Java code defining csrf, authorizeHttpRequests, and sessionManagement.

auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.general_idea: Add explanatory comments to clarify why stateless session management is configured and how Spring Security defaults work.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.human_impl: Added multi-line comment explaining session creation policy and SecurityContext behavior.

auth-service/src/main/java/com/meditrack.general_idea: Comment out the custom JWT filter registration to disable it in the current security configuration.
Removed the hardcoded 'None' value for the membership field during user registration.
Renamed the database table from 'userDetails' to 'user_details' to follow snake_case naming conventions.
Removed the 'membership' field from the UserEntity class.

analytics-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.

api-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Remove the explicit version override for Lombok in the dependency exclusion, likely relying on parent or managed versions.

auth-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Remove the explicit version exclusion for Lombok, likely relying on managed versions or a different dependency structure.

billing-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.

patient-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.

analytics-service/Dockerfile.general_idea: Changed the Maven build stage base image from Eclipse Temurin to Amazon Corretto to standardize the JDK distribution.
Changed the runtime stage base image from OpenJDK to Amazon Corretto Alpine to standardize the JDK distribution and reduce image size.
Updated the exposed container port from 5003 to 8080 to align with the new service configuration.
